name: skill: SKILL.md mentions the R-3 detectors (a11y-axe, bundle-budget, rsc-boundary, exhaustive-deps) so operator knows what runs
command: for d in a11y-axe bundle-budget rsc-boundary exhaustive-deps; do grep -E "$d" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/react-component-build/SKILL.md" >/dev/null || { echo "FAIL $d unreferenced" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; echo ok 1>&2
